input.command:
git add README.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix typo in README.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push

questions.question: Should I push this commit to the remote so your teammates can see the change?

options.label: Push to origin main (Recommended)
options.description: Sets upstream and shares the fix with your team immediately

options.label: Hold locally
options.description: You'll push manually or make additional changes first

options.label: Reset the commit
options.description: Undo the commit if you want to review or adjust first

final_message: I've asked you to confirm whether to push the change. The commit is already created on your main branch; I'm waiting for your decision on how to proceed.
